title: Broadcom India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Broadcom India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India:
Broadcom India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India!
